latex: The mean of 5, 8 and 17 is equal to the mean of 12 and $y$. What is the value of $y$?
notes: }  \textbf{Answer:} Recall that the order of operations says that the squares must be performed first, followed by the multiplication, and then the addition and subtraction. We get\begin{align*}4^2+3^2\cdot 2^2-5^2&=16+9\cdot 4-25 \\ &=16+36-25 \\ &=52-25 \\ &=\boxed{27}.\end{align*} }
